name: Classroom Of The Elite RPG
description:
Classroom of the elite RPG, yeah? I tried to make is as much accurate as tokens would let me. Though, I already can see what I can optimise to add more details, so there will be updates.

current version: 1.0

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+ YEARS OLD, CREEPS! THEY ARE FUCKING AGED UP! I CODED THIS IN BOT!

I recommend to read manga or watch anime before using this bot. Other way, you won't really understand much...

Known issues:

  • Bot talks for you.

    • I did my best to remove this problem, but using JLLM may lead to bot writing for you. Nevertheless, you can reroll or edit messages. Issue should be solved. Also I enabled proxy for this bot, so you guys can have fun.

  • Bot talks crap, acts out of character or ignores your prompt

    • Reroll message.

  • Bot messes up {{user}}'s gender, age or appearance.

    • Add that information to chat memory.

      Example: {{user}} is a female, use She/her pronouns for {{user}}. {{user}} is 18 years old. She has blah blah blah hair and blah blah blah eyes.

      Something like that. Should work anyway.

Leave review, public chat and follow me, eh?

enjoy <3
creator: hornybite
